## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance trending upward; publishing more content expected to improve results](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Migration to new domain nearly complete; indexing issues should resolve soon](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Focusing on practitioner-level content and mid-market companies (500-3000 employees) for awareness](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [New dashboard in development to track AI/LLM tool referrals and prompt performance](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Topics

### Technical Issues with CMS Access

  - [Jason and Sydney experiencing copy-paste restrictions in island browser](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [IT meeting scheduled to resolve the issue](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Abdallah to follow up on API access for CMS to improve content publishing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### SEO Performance and Indexing

  - [Upward trend in performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Some articles not indexed immediately; manual requests needed](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Google indexing allocation maxed out due to migration](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Old domain (AbnormalSecurity.com) URLs mostly dropped from search results](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [10 Glossary/AI Glossary pages and 10 blog posts published weekly](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Aiming for 3/day publishing cadence to clear backlog, then 2/day](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Expanding glossary with new terms like "defense in depth" and "zero data"](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Focusing on EMEA keywords and incorporating VEC report into content](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Ranking Visibility for EMEA

  - [EMEA team concerned about search result rankings](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Jason to set up SEMrush view for keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Focus on traffic growth as primary metric, with ranking as secondary](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Content Ideation

  - [18 articles left in current batch](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Emily to review new ideas sent by Sydney](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Shift towards content for practitioners (e.g., IT managers, email security managers)](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Consider creating a separate section for more technical, practitioner-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

### AI/LLM Referral Tracking

  - [New dashboard in development to track referrals from LLM tools](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Will show traffic, landing pages, prompt performance, and result sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content addressing gaps in AI tool responses](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emily to review new content ideas and approve or request more](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Jason to finalize AI/LLM referral tracking dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Abdallah to follow up on API access for CMS](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Team to consider creating a new section for practitioner-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up with product marketing team to discuss AI prompt strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sJRZa4LTbRUKziqTzpmLnbg83TeNy57A?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
